# N-Tech Energy Solutions LLC

> A North Texas solar contracting and home energy efficiency company. Transparent pricing, no door-to-door sales, no commission salespeople.

N-Tech Energy Solutions LLC coordinates residential solar design and home energy audits for homeowners in Wise, Parker, Jack, and Montague Counties in North Texas — within a 60-mile radius of Chico, TX. We work with licensed installer partners (Will Power Electric LLC) rather than employing field crews directly.

**Founded:** 2025/2026 — actively building first 25 founding customers
**Service area:** 60-mile radius of Chico, TX 76431 (North Texas)
**Contact:** customerexperience@n-tech-es.com | (214) 267-9372
**Hours:** Mon–Fri 8am–7pm · Saturday 9am–4pm

## Services

### Solar Contracting
Residential solar design, sales, and project coordination. We handle permitting, utility interconnection (Oncor), engineering stamps, and installation coordination. We do not own equipment or employ installers directly.

**Pricing (installed, per watt):**
- Starter: $2.40/watt
- Standard: $2.50/watt
- Premium: $2.70/watt
- Power Plus: $2.90/watt

Typical 10kW system: $24,000–$29,000 before the 30% federal Investment Tax Credit.

### Home Energy Audits
Professional energy audits using freelance auditors. Identifies efficiency gaps — insulation, air sealing, HVAC, windows — before committing to solar. Good standalone service for homeowners not ready for solar.

## Cities Served

**Wise County:** Decatur, Bridgeport, Chico, Boyd, Alvord, Rhome, Newark, Paradise
**Parker County:** Weatherford, Aledo, Azle, Springtown, Willow Park
**Jack County:** Jacksboro, Perrin
**Montague County:** Bowie, Nocona, Montague

## Brand Position

- No pushy sales tactics; no commission salespeople; no door-to-door
- Transparent, public pricing (unusual in the solar industry)
- Solar presented as an option, not a prescription — energy audits are an equally valid starting point
- Chamber of Commerce member (Chico, TX)
- Grid territory: Oncor Electric Delivery
